subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness to thy devotion, attentiveness and presence, shouldst thou but ponder upon this supreme bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی شهادت میدهد باقبال و توجه و حضور اگر در این فضل اکبر تفکر نمائی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @rejection, opposition and persecution
